title: TEC Prediction with GNSS–Aditya-L1 & LSTM
desc: Time-series prediction of ionospheric TEC using GNSS and Aditya-L1 solar data.
details:
This project develops a data-driven framework to predict ionospheric Total Electron Content (TEC) by integrating GNSS observations with solar activity data from Aditya-L1. The system combines ground-based GNSS measurements with space-based solar inputs to model the nonlinear coupling between solar activity and ionospheric behaviour.

The pipeline includes GNSS preprocessing (STEC to VTEC conversion, elevation filtering >30°, and median aggregation across satellites) and solar data extraction from SOLEXS (X-ray flux) and ASPEX (ion flux and plasma parameters). All datasets are temporally aligned and cleaned to form a unified time-series dataset.

An LSTM-based deep learning model is trained on 24-timestep sequences to capture temporal dependencies in TEC variation, incorporating both solar parameters and temporal features.
results: Achieved high prediction accuracy across locations: Ahmedabad (RMSE ≈ 3.61 TECU, MAPE ≈ 7.25%), Shimla (RMSE ≈ 2.77 TECU, MAPE ≈ 6.68%), and Trivandrum (RMSE ≈ 1.91 TECU, MAPE ≈ 3.69%). The model remained robust under noise injection (10–50%) and demonstrated cross-location generalization with MAPE ≈ 15%.
tech: Python • TensorFlow/Keras • Pandas • NumPy • CDFlib • Astropy • GNSS Data Processing • Time-Series Modeling

title: Extended Kalman Filter for GPS Positioning
desc: State estimation and noise-aware GPS positioning using EKF.
details:
Developed an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework for GPS positioning by modeling nonlinear satellite-receiver dynamics and measurement noise. The system estimates receiver position and velocity using recursive prediction-update cycles.

The implementation includes state transition modeling, measurement linearization, and covariance propagation. Noise handling techniques were applied to improve estimation stability under uncertain signal conditions.
results: Improved positioning accuracy compared to basic filtering approaches, with stable convergence under noisy observations and dynamic conditions.
tech: Python • Kalman Filtering • State Estimation • Numerical Methods
